product_page.page_title: 3D Air Mesh Fabric - ArAir Mesh AA 150 - Ariteks
description_blocks: 100% polyester, 150 g/m² 3d warp knitted air mesh fabric.
ArAir Mesh AA 150 fabric due to its 3d warp knitting structure has high suspension function.
It can be used as upholstery mesh for office furniture.
Suitable for sport and military shoes.
One of the usage of ArAir Mesh AA 150 is shock aboserber in medical.

text_blocks.text: 3D Air Mesh, upholstery fabrics. Transport Technical Textiles

100% polyester, 150 g/m² 3d warp knitted air mesh fabric. ArAir Mesh AA 150 fabric due to its 3d warp knitting structure has high suspension function. It can be used as upholstery mesh for office furniture. Suitable for sport and military shoes. One of the usage of ArAir Mesh AA 150 is shock aboserber in medical. Ultra confortable bag fabric. Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) TS EN ISO 1833 Yarn 68 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 150 ±5 g/m² TS EN 12127 Width 1500 ±20 mm TS EN 1773 Thickness 3 mm BS 2544 Bursting strength > 2000 kPa (kN/m² ) TS EN 13938-1 Dimensinal Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% TS EN ISO 5077 Abrasion Resistance @50000 TS EN 530 Rubbing Fastness 4 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C01 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 B02 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Uphosltery, Bag, Shoes Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Technical Documents >> ArAir Mesh AA 150 Data Sheet Certificates

3D Air Mesh Fabric - ArAir Mesh AA 150 - Ariteks
3D Air Mesh, upholstery fabrics.
Transport Technical Textiles
ArAir Mesh AA 150
150 gr/m
2
, 100% Polyester, Air Mesh Fabric
100% polyester, 150 g/m² 3d warp knitted air mesh fabric.
ArAir Mesh AA 150 fabric due to its 3d warp knitting structure has high suspension function.
It can be used as upholstery mesh for office furniture.
Suitable for sport and military shoes.
One of the usage of ArAir Mesh AA 150 is shock aboserber in medical.
Ultra confortable bag fabric.
